mapper.update: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ${tableName} ( id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, key VARCHAR(512) UNIQUE NOT NULL, value TEXT, metadata JSONB, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_${tableName}_key ON ${tableName} (key)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_${tableName}_created_at ON ${tableName} (created_at)
CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector
